zh.lifeSummary: Beatrix de Taillebois是Ivo de Taillebois和Unknown first wife的女兒，於大約1068年出生。她和Eldred至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於大約1112年在英國林可爾史爾享年46歲。

nameMeanings.name: Beatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: Beatrix de Taillebois was born about 1068 as the daughter of Ivo de Taillebois and Unknown first wife. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Eldred. She died about 1112, in Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Beatrix de Taillebois est née environ 1068, fille de Ivo de Taillebois et Unknown first wife. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Eldred. Elle est décédée environ 1112, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Beatrix de Taillebois wurde um 1068, als Tochter von Ivo de Taillebois und Unknown first wife geboren. Sie hatte mit Eldred mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1112 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Lincolnshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Beatrix de Taillebois è nata il circa 1068 come figlia di Ivo de Taillebois e Unknown first wife. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Eldred. Morì circa 1112, nel Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrix de Tailleboisは約1068年にIvo de TailleboisとUnknown first wifeの娘として生まれた。彼女はEldredとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1112年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrix de Taillebois(은)는 대략 1068년 Ivo de Taillebois(와)과 Unknown first wife의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Eldred(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1112년 영국 링코실르에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.
